exercises.title: Pauli Product Calculator
exercises.description: Implement efficient multiplication of Pauli operators.
tasks: Create functions for single-qubit Pauli products
Extend to multi-qubit Pauli string products
exercises.expectedOutput: Pauli product calculator with phase tracking
hints: For n-qubit: multiply position by position
Total phase is product of individual phases

exercises.title: Commutation Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze commutation relations for multi-qubit Pauli operators.
tasks: Generate all commuting pairs for n=3
Verify stabilizer commutation for Steane code
hints: Maximal commuting sets relate to stabilizers

exercises.title: Symplectic Representation
exercises.description: Implement the symplectic binary representation of Paulis.
tasks: Convert Pauli strings to (x,z) binary vectors
Convert back from binary to Pauli strings
hints: Binary ops are XOR for product

exercises.title: Pauli Group Generator
exercises.description: Generate and analyze the full Pauli group structure.
tasks: Generate all elements of Gₙ for n ≤ 4
